ddls:
CREATE TABLE "balls" (
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ball */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the ball was bowled */,
  "over_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the over in which the ball was bowled */,
  "ball_number" TEXT /* Number of the ball within the over */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman facing the ball */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler bowling the ball */,
  "non_striker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-striker at the other end */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored from the ball */,
  "wicket_status" TEXT /* Status of the wicket (e.g., Not out, bowled) */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot played (e.g., defensive, aggressive) */,
  "delivery_type" TEXT /* Type of delivery bowled (e.g., fast, spin) */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., bowled, caught) */,
  "is_no_ball" INTEGER /* Is the ball a no-ball? */,
  "is_wide" INTEGER /* Is the ball a wide? */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Number of extras (e.g., byes, leg-byes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ball_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_non_striker_id FOREIGN KEY ("non_striker_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_over_id FOREIGN KEY ("over_id") REFERENCES overs ("over_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match is played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing in the match */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., team1 wins, team2 wins, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overs" (
  "over_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each over */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the over was bowled */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inning in which the over was bowled */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Number of the over within the inning */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler bowling the over */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded by the bowler in the over */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the bowler in the over */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("over_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overs_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overs_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the cricket ground or stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the venue was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain */,
  "home_ground_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home ground of the team */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES captains ("captain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., fast, spin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inning */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match in which the inning took place */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Number of the inning within the match */,
  "batting_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team batting in the inning */,
  "bowling_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team bowling in the inning */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the batting team */,
  "wickets_lost" INTEGER /* Number of wickets lost by the batting team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_bowling_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowling_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_batting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("batting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captains" (
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each captain */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the captain belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the captain */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("captain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wickets" (
  "wicket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wicket */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ball on which the wicket was taken */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was dismissed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of wicket (e.g., bowled, caught) */,
  "dismissed_by" TEXT /* ID of the player who took the wicket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wicket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wickets_ball_id FOREIGN KEY ("ball_id") REFERENCES balls ("ball_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wickets_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the umpire */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the umpire */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_umpires" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the umpire assigned to the match */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the umpire (e.g., on-field, third) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "average" TEXT /* Average runs scored by the player */,
  "strike_rate" TEXT /* Strike rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the season (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
